title: mentha × subtomentosa
intro: Mentha × subtomentosa, also known as pineapple mint or corn mint, is a hybrid species of mint that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in various herbal remedies. The health benefits of Mentha × subtomentosa include relief from digestive issues, nausea, and headaches, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also often used as a garnish or additive in culinary dishes due to its unique pineapple-like flavor and aroma.
